Class OpenRpc14MethodImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openrpc.v1x.v14.OpenRpc14MethodImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Extensible, Node, OpenRpcExtensible, OpenRpcMethod, OpenRpcReferenceable, OpenRpcServersParent, OpenRpc1xExtensible, OpenRpc1xMethod, OpenRpc1xReferenceable, OpenRpc1xServersParent, OpenRpc14Extensible, OpenRpc14Method, OpenRpc14Referenceable, OpenRpc14ServersParent, Referenceable, ServersParent, Visitable
public class OpenRpc14MethodImpl extends NodeImpl implements OpenRpc14Method
